tasks.label: Watch Extension (dev)
tasks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.proto/bin:$HOME/.proto/shims:$PATH" && pnpm -C packages/exosuit-vscode exec vite build -c vite.extension.config.mts --watch
tasks.detail: Vite watch mode for extension bundle — restart host to pick up changes
